description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to all branches except staging.tmp, trying.tmp, and staging-squash-merge.tmp, and on every pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-18.04) with different configurations, checks out the repository with submodules, prepares the environment, builds and tests the project in debug and release modes, and packages and uploads the artifacts.
